text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 37 

HOP_VISITS 

LABEL: Hospital Outpatient Visits 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the count of revenue center dates (as a proxy for visits) in the hospital outpatient (HOP) 
setting for the year. Note that the algorithm counts the dates on each of the claim revenue lines; 
therefore if the same revenue center date appears on two different claims then it is counted as two 
visits.
